creator: bsam@ipt.ru
text:
Hello Paul,


the port builds but doesn't install while package building. I've got
tons of messages (the last two lines) at my tinderbox:
-----
...
install  -o root -g wheel -m 555 /work/a/ports/security/bro/work/bro-1.2.1/scripts/perl/script/site-report.pl /usr/local/bro/scripts
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 /work/a/ports/security/bro/work/bro-1.2.1/aux/adtrace/adtrace /usr/local/bin
/bin/sh /work/a/ports/security/bro/work/pkg-install
****************************************
* RUNNING THE BRO CONFIGURATION SCRIPT *
****************************************

Automode not enabled

Running Bro Configuration Utility

Values enclosed in '[ ]'s are the default value set if you hit return.

**** Detected previous bro.cfg file *****
May I use /usr/local/etc/bro.cfg.example for defaults? [Y/n]Please answer Y or N
**** Detected previous bro.cfg file *****
May I use /usr/local/etc/bro.cfg.example for defaults? [Y/n]Please answer Y or N
**** Detected previous bro.cfg file *****
May I use /usr/local/etc/bro.cfg.example for defaults? [Y/n]Please answer Y or N
...
-----

BTW, the port headers at Makefile usually are not changed when the
port is upgraded/maintainer is changed etc...

HTH and thanks for taking care of the port.


WBR
-- 
bsam
